info.title: ManicTimeMcp
info.description:
MCP server for read-only access to local ManicTime activity data. Independent integration — not affiliated with or endorsed by ManicTime or Finkit.
Scopes:
activity ...
prompt ...
resource ...
screenshot ...
summary ...
timeline ...
usage ...
workspace ...

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help for current scope or command.

options.name: --output
options.description: Set output format (for example json, yaml, xml, markd...

options.name: --answer
options.description:
Global Commands:
help [path] Show help for current path or a specific path. Aliases: ?
..          Go up one level in interactive mode.
exit        Leave interactive mode.
